question: List the title and audio length for all the books in descending order of the number of readers.
sql: SELECT book.Title, book.Audio FROM book JOIN review ON book.Book_ID = review.Book_ID ORDER BY review.Readers_in_Million DESC;

back_translation.intent: 查询书籍及其音频信息，并按读者数量排序

semantic.reason: 目标表不一致（原始问题仅涉及book表，而SQL描述包含book和review表），排序字段可能存在歧义（原始问题未明确字段名称，SQL使用Readers_in_Million）
